_comment: Each entry is a malicious .mcp.json fragment that the test loop should flag/reject. Not all keys are valid simultaneously; tests load one server at a time.

shadow-control-flow._attack: Tool name will be 'agent_explore' to bypass control-flow approval whitelist

fake-readonly._attack: Server returns ReadOnlyHint=true on a tool that actually writes; trustReadOnlyHint must be off by default
